title: thesomewhatyou's Old School Computer Revival project
description:
A project that will help revive old PCs that have integrated graphics for optimal Minecraft gameplay.
This will include an arrange of optimization mods that are compatible and whatnot.
body:
# Welcome!

Hi, welcome to thesomewhatyou's Old Computer Revival Project. (TOSCR)

This is a modpack for computers that have a crappy iGPU. 

## ⚠️ Warning! ⚠️

This project is not quite perfected. Consistency is key, but this key, mind you, is not here.

TOSCR is a very iffy modpack, as monthly updates MAY be provided, but they may not be optimal. This mod is not going under the bus anytime soon. This is just a start. I can promise a few things, like:
* No bugs that affect gameplay
* A slow, yet steady release
* And most importantly, around 100+ FPS for old PCs using this.
* If you use this on a newer computer, you'll experience even HIGHER FPS

## thesomewhatyou, why'd ya do this?

I used a crusty old iMac. I know some people that still use it to this day. Minecraft runs horribly on old PCs, especially with limiting Java capabilities, with major stuttering and a deadly amount of lag (a lot worse than this modpack could be). That's why I made TOSCR. It can solve most lag and eliminate stutter almost entirely.

## Restrictions:

This work is licensed under CC BY-NC-SA 4.0, so if you're remixing my modpack (which is fine according to the licensing) you must follow these guidelines. 

# Statement

This project will be **entirely free, forever.** You heard me right! Ko-Fi is available however. Modrinth will also be paying me...
...eight cents.

[![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/W7W61DEEH8)

## Anyways...

If you ever do download this, thanks. I'm working pretty hard on this, and I'm investigating things I do not know about. I want the Minecraft community to be happy. Downloading this, or even just reading this brings me joy. Bye! ❤️

Looking for the CurseForge page? Click [here.](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/toscr)
